use_cases: User contact and inquiry forms on SaaS landing pages
Support request forms in help centers
Lead capture forms in marketing sites
Contact sections in portfolio or business websites
Customer feedback forms for service-based businesses
ai_summary: A contact form block from shadcnblockscom built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS. Uses CVA for button variants and cn utility for class merging. Designed as a reusable contact section component with standard form inputs and submit button. Follows shadcn/ui design patterns for consistent styling across the component ecosystem.
